About_&_Key_Points:
About
Cera Sanitaryware Ltd is engaged in the business of manufacturing, selling and trading of various kinds of building products. It also has non-conventional wind & solar power for captive use in the state of Gujarat.
[1]
Key Points
Product Offerings
The company offers a full spectrum of products, including sanitaryware, faucetware, tiles, wellness products (bathtubs, shower panels & enclosures), kitchen sinks, and mirrors under three brands,
Senator, CERA Luxe, and CERA
, catering to evolving consumer aspirations.
